titles.title: His Banner Over Me (He Brought Me to His)

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The Lord is mine and I am His, His banner over me is love. The Lord is mine and I am His, His banner over me is love. The Lord is mine and I am His, His banner over me is love. His banner over me is love!

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He brought me to His banqueting table, His banner over me is love. He brought me to His banqueting table, His banner over me is love. He brought me to His banqueting table, His banner over me is love. His banner over me is love!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He lifted me up into heavenly places, His banner over me is love. He lifted me up into heavenly places, His banner over me is love. He lifted me up into heavenly places, His banner over me is love. His banner over me is love!

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: He is the vine and we are the branches, His banner over me is love. He is the vine and we are the branches, His banner over me is love. He is the vine and we are the branches, His banner over me is love. His banner over me is love!

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Jesus is the rock of my salvation, His banner over me is love. Jesus is the rock of my salvation, His banner over me is love. Jesus is the rock of my salvation, His banner over me is love. His banner over me is love!

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: There's one way to peace through the power of the cross, His banner over me is love, There's one way to peace through the power of the cross, His banner over me is love, There's one way to peace through the power of the cross, His banner over me is love. His banner over me is love!
